steps.title: Identify the general statement
steps.content: The underlined sentence shifts from describing a specific institution (Museo de Las Americas, founded 1991) to a general claim: “Since 2000, the number of Latino cultural institutions in the US has expanded considerably.” This appears right before introducing another specific institution (LA Plaza, founded 2011).

steps.title: Determine the function
steps.content:
The sentence identifies a historical trend (post-2000 expansion of Latino institutions) that provides context for LA Plaza, founded in 2011—this is the sentence's function.

A and C incorrectly attribute functions about comparing or analyzing institutional characteristics that the sentence never discusses; D misreads the timeline by suggesting this expansion inspired both institutions when the Museo was founded before 2000.

That confirms B is correct.
